payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Three-quarter side view of a dark brown leather recliner with tufted backrest, padded armrests, visible side-mounted recliner lever and pronounced creasing/wear in the upholstery; chair appears upright and mostly visible but is slightly edge-cropped at the top/left, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
